pairs.question: What was the win-loss record of the 1910 University of New Mexico football team under head coach Carl Hamilton?
pairs.answer: The 1910 University of New Mexico football team compiled a 0–3 record under head coach Carl Hamilton (also listed as H. B. Hamilton), failing to win any games during the season.

pairs.question: How did the University of New Mexico finance its 1910 football team?
pairs.answer: The team was funded with a $500 appropriation from the board of regents on the condition that students raise an additional $1,000. Due to financial constraints and difficulties securing funding, the team struggled throughout the season.

pairs.question: What was the worst defeat in the University of New Mexico football program's history prior to 1917?
pairs.answer: The worst defeat occurred on November 4, 1910, when the team lost 80–0 to New Mexico Military. This record stood until 1917, when the team suffered a 107-point loss to New Mexico A&M.

pairs.question: Why was the remainder of the 1910 University of New Mexico football season canceled?
pairs.answer: After an 80-point loss to New Mexico Military on November 4, university president E. McQueen Gray directed the athletic council to cancel the rest of the season due to the team’s poor performance and ongoing financial struggles.

pairs.question: Who was the captain of the 1910 University of New Mexico football team and what position did he play?
pairs.answer: Walter R. Allen was the 1910 team captain, and he played at the center position.

pairs.question: List the players on the 1910 University of New Mexico football team and their positions.
pairs.answer: The team included Lyle Abbott, Walter R. Allen (center), B. Arens (guard/end/halfback), W. Arens (tackle), C.L. Bernard (forward), Hugh Carlisle (end), Ed DeWolf (guard), R.D. Gladding (guard), James Hamilton (tackle), Harold Hill (halfback), Karl Karsten (guard), Charles Lembke (forward), H.E. Marsh (guard/tackle), Patterson (halfback), Howard Seder (forward), Lawrence Selva (end), and E. Smith (halfback).

pairs.question: How did the cancellation of the 1910 season affect the territorial cup game against Arizona?
pairs.answer: The Arizona game was forfeited after the season was canceled, and as a result, the territorial cup that the teams played for was returned to Arizona.
